title: SaoWorld - Unofficial
description: Unofficial community edition modpack — made for saoworld.net
body:
A lightweight, performance-focused modpack built on Fabric for Minecraft 1.21.11.

Designed to enhance the SaoWorld experience with improved performance, better visuals, immersive UI elements, map utilities, chat enhancements, and shader support while remaining fully compatible with the server.

No fluff, just what matters.

Mod List:

    architectury
    bobby
    chat_heads
    chatanimation
    chatsigninghider
    cinematiczoom
    cloth-config
    drippyloadingscreen
    fabric-api
    fadeless
    fancymenu
    ferritecore
    Gamma-Utils
    ImmediatelyFast
    ImmersiveUI
    iris
    itemzoom
    journeymap
    konkrete
    lithium
    melody
    modmenu
    notutorial
    placeholder-api
    Shatterlib
    sodium

Shaders:
    Complementary Unbound r5.4
